def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    atr = ta.volatility.AverageTrueRange(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=params['atr_window']).average_true_range()
    atr_multiplier = params['atr_multiplier']
    rolling_high = df['high'].rolling(window=params['lookback']).max()
    rolling_low = df['low'].rolling(window=params['lookback']).min()
    upper_band = rolling_high + atr * atr_multiplier
    lower_band = rolling_low - atr * atr_multiplier
    signals = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    signals[df['close'] > upper_band] = 1
    signals[df['close'] < lower_band] = -1
    return signals.astype(int)
rationale: AUD/USD exhibits volatility breakouts when price moves beyond dynamic bands derived from ATR-adjusted historical highs and lows, capturing significant trend continuations.
